text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh... Maybe I shouldn't be here after all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There are so many racers here. What if my bad
luck causes something to ha—
choice_data_list:
That's not what you should be thinking about
right now.

That's not what you should be thinking about
right now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I need to focus. That way I can beat Bourbon in
the Kikuka Sho... Right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... All I did was say my goal out loud.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. All right... do your best this summer, Rice!
Here we go!
